description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical plastic bottle with a white screw cap and a predominantly black label wrapping around its body. The label features blue and teal graphic elements, possibly including stylized text and imagery, with some areas of fine print visible on the back. The bottle's body appears semi-translucent, allowing some light to pass through but not enough to clearly see the contents inside. The cap is ribbed for grip and is slightly wider than the neck of the bottle. The overall design suggests it is intended for holding liquids, such as water, cleaning solutions, or other consumables. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottle stands upright with a smooth, glossy surface.
description: A tall, semi-translucent plastic bottle with a white screw cap and a black label featuring blue and teal graphics. The bottle is sleek, upright, and designed for holding liquids.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with blue and teal graphics and some stylized text.
description_view_1: Side view with more of the label's graphic design visible, but less text detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying fine print and a barcode on the label, with less graphic design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional fine print and label details, mostly text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Black label with blue and teal graphics, stylized text, fine print, and a barcode on the back.
